description: 195 class-specific backgrounds, 5 per class. Each background is tied to one class via for_classes. Filtered in character creator by selected class.

profession_backgrounds.name: City Gate Sentinel
profession_backgrounds.description: You served as a city or castle gate guard — the last line of civilian defense. You learned to read crowds, stand your ground, and hold a post without relief.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You have stood in more doorways than you care to count. Nothing gets past you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Iron Company Footsoldier
profession_backgrounds.description: You served in a heavy infantry formation — a mercenary company or standing army. Formation discipline and the knowledge that the man beside you is the only thing between you and chaos.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The man in front of you goes down, you step over him and hold the line.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pit Fighter
profession_backgrounds.description: You fought in pit arenas for crowds and coin. You learned to take hits, stay standing, and make suffering look like theater.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The crowd wanted blood. You gave them a show. You learned to make them the same thing.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shield for Hire
profession_backgrounds.description: You were paid to keep someone alive. You learned threat assessment, crowd reading, and the weight of someone else's life.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You learned to read a crowd for threats before they knew they were threatening.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shieldwall Veteran
profession_backgrounds.description: You stood in the wall at set-piece battles — shoulder to shoulder, no retreat, no individual glory. You know what it means to be a piece of something that cannot break.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: In the wall, you are not a person. You are a piece of something that cannot break.

profession_backgrounds.name: Bloodfield Skirmisher
profession_backgrounds.description: You fought at the front of chaotic engagements — not in formation, but ahead of it. You learned to survive disorder when everyone around you was dying from it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You charged things that were bigger than you. Most of the time it worked.

profession_backgrounds.name: Tribal Champion
profession_backgrounds.description: Your people sent you forward as their champion. You carried their honor into every fight. You have not yet decided whether that was a gift or a burden.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Your people sent you forward. You have not yet decided if that was an honor.

profession_backgrounds.name: Hard Charger
profession_backgrounds.description: You served as the forward element of mercenary contracts — whoever paid, you charged. You are very good at not hesitating at the worst moment.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Every contract ends the same way. You walk away, or you don't.

profession_backgrounds.name: Surviving Conscript
profession_backgrounds.description: You were drafted into a conflict you didn't choose and survived campaigns that killed most of your unit. You carry what that does to a person.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't choose the war. The war chose you. You're still not sure who won.

profession_backgrounds.name: Arena Circuit
profession_backgrounds.description: You competed in gladiatorial circuits before walking away — or being thrown out. You know what it is to perform violence for an audience and what that costs.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They cheered when you bled. You remembered their faces.

profession_backgrounds.name: Coastal Raider
profession_backgrounds.description: You raided coastal settlements from the sea — fast, violent, and gone before the response organized. The sea taught you that speed is mercy, for everyone.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The sea taught you that everything worth taking is worth taking fast.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pack Hunter
profession_backgrounds.description: You hunted dangerous prey in a crew — beasts, men, or things that were harder to categorize. You learned which member of the pack you were.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You hunted in packs. You learned which one of you was the apex.

profession_backgrounds.name: Debt Enforcer
profession_backgrounds.description: You enforced criminal debts with your presence and, when necessary, your hands. People paid because you were the consequence.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: People paid. Usually. The ones who didn't became the example.

profession_backgrounds.name: Warcult Initiate
profession_backgrounds.description: You were initiated into a cult that worshipped violence as holy rite. You carry their marks and some of their beliefs, though not all of them survived contact with reality.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They taught you that rage was holy. You still aren't sure they were wrong.

profession_backgrounds.name: Escaped Slave-Fighter
profession_backgrounds.description: You were forced to fight for others' entertainment, then broke free. What you carry from that time is not all damage — some of it is precision.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They made you fight for their entertainment. Now you fight for yourself.

profession_backgrounds.name: Heavy Cavalry Rider
profession_backgrounds.description: You served in mounted vanguard units, crashing into enemy lines at speed. You learned to be the thing that breaks formations.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: On horseback you were unstoppable. You're learning to be the same on foot.

profession_backgrounds.name: Breach Specialist
profession_backgrounds.description: You were first through the breach in siege assaults — first up the ladder, first through the gate. The life expectancy is short. You exceeded it repeatedly.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Breaching a wall means being first. You were always first.

profession_backgrounds.name: Almost-Elite
profession_backgrounds.description: You trained for an elite guard unit and fell short of selection — or were removed for reasons that were never fully explained. The training stayed. The question stayed too.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't fail because you weren't good enough. You're still working out why you failed.

profession_backgrounds.name: Standard Bearer
profession_backgrounds.description: You carried the battle standard in pitched fights — the most visible target on the field. The flag never fell. You took that personally.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The flag never falls. You took that literally.

profession_backgrounds.name: War Academy Graduate
profession_backgrounds.description: You received formal military education — forms, theory, command structure. Experience has been teaching you everything the academy skipped.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They taught you the forms. Experience taught you what the forms miss.

profession_backgrounds.name: Guild Duelist
profession_backgrounds.description: You competed in formal dueling guild circuits — ranked bouts, witnesses, rules. You know the difference between killing and winning. They are not always the same.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: In the guild, you learn the difference between killing and winning. They're not the same.

profession_backgrounds.name: Honorbound Second
profession_backgrounds.description: You served as others' second in formal duels — negotiating terms, standing in when required, ensuring honor was satisfied. You fought many fights that weren't yours.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You stood in for others so many times you forgot which fights were yours.

profession_backgrounds.name: Fencing School Graduate
profession_backgrounds.description: You trained at a prestigious fencing school — proper form, named techniques, theory of the blade. Then you used what you learned outside their walls.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The school taught you everything that matters. The street taught you everything else.

profession_backgrounds.name: Blade Collector
profession_backgrounds.description: You collected debts through demonstrated competence with a blade. Most payments happened before you drew. Most.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Most debts were paid before you drew. Most.

profession_backgrounds.name: Formalized Street Fighter
profession_backgrounds.description: You started as a street brawler and taught yourself formal swordsmanship from books, observation, and losing to people who knew more. Your style is unorthodox and effective.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The fencing masters said your style was wrong. Your opponents agreed less.

profession_backgrounds.name: Staff Officer
profession_backgrounds.description: You served on tactical staff in organized armies — coordinating, planning, issuing orders on behalf of commanders. You learned that strategy is just the distance between a problem and the person solving it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Strategy is just the distance between the problem and the person solving it.

profession_backgrounds.name: War College Theorist
profession_backgrounds.description: You studied military theory formally — historical campaigns, tactical doctrine, command failures. You are now finding out how theory interacts with mud, blood, and people who didn't read the same books.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: In theory, the plan always works. You have become very interested in exceptions.

profession_backgrounds.name: Siege Engineer's Aide
profession_backgrounds.description: You assisted siege engineers — planned approaches, calculated vulnerabilities, understood how things are built so you could understand how to stop them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Every fortification has a weak point. Finding it is just applied observation.

profession_backgrounds.name: Quartermaster
profession_backgrounds.description: You managed logistics for military campaigns. An army marches on its stomach — you made sure it marched on something else too.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: An army marches on its stomach. You made sure it marched on something else too.

profession_backgrounds.name: Battle Chronicler
profession_backgrounds.description: You documented battles — before, during, and after — and studied the record obsessively. You know more about why battles are won and lost than most commanders do.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You documented every battle you survived. The ones you didn't, someone else documented.

profession_backgrounds.name: Frontier Scout
profession_backgrounds.description: You scouted ahead for expeditions and armies — finding paths, assessing threats, and returning with accurate information. There is no path until you make one.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: There is no path until you make one. You've made hundreds.

profession_backgrounds.name: Trail Blazer
profession_backgrounds.description: You opened new paths through wilderness for those who came after you. The people who use your trails rarely know your name. You decided that was fine.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The people who use your paths never know your name. That's fine.

profession_backgrounds.name: Exiled Wanderer
profession_backgrounds.description: Home is somewhere you cannot go. So you went everywhere else. Exile taught you navigation out of necessity and survival as identity.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Home is somewhere you cannot go. So you went everywhere else.

profession_backgrounds.name: River Guide
profession_backgrounds.description: You navigated rivers for trade and travel — reading current, depth, hazard. Rivers always go somewhere. You learned to go with them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Rivers always go somewhere. You learned to go with them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Expedition Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: They sent a group. You are the one who came back. The skills that kept you alive are not small — but neither is what it cost to use them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They sent twenty. One came back. You stopped counting why.

profession_backgrounds.name: Tournament Archer
profession_backgrounds.description: You competed in archery tournaments — ranked, measured, witnessed. Still. Breathe. Release. Ten thousand repetitions.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Still. Breathe. Release. You've done it ten thousand times.

profession_backgrounds.name: Hunter-for-Hire
profession_backgrounds.description: You hunted for settlement contracts — meat, hides, dangerous animals. They wanted reliability. You gave them reliability. Those are different products.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They wanted meat. You gave them reliability. Those are different products.

profession_backgrounds.name: Watchtower Sentinel
profession_backgrounds.description: You defended from elevated positions — hours of stillness, seconds of action. You paid attention for a living, and it shows.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Hours of nothing. Then one second of everything. You always paid attention.

profession_backgrounds.name: Caravan Outrider
profession_backgrounds.description: You rode wide of trade caravans, watching for threats from elevation and distance. You saw problems before the caravan did and kept them that way.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You rode wide of the road and watched for things that moved wrong.

profession_backgrounds.name: Poaching Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You hunted illegally to survive and evaded the rangers sent after you. The forest kept you. The law wanted you. You learned which one was real.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The law wanted you. The forest kept you. You learned which one was real.

profession_backgrounds.name: Animal Trainer
profession_backgrounds.description: You trained animals for trade, labor, or performance. Animals respond to what you mean, not what you say. You had to learn the difference.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Animals respond to what you mean, not what you say. You had to learn the difference.

profession_backgrounds.name: Stable Hand
profession_backgrounds.description: You grew up with horses and working animals — cleaning stalls before you could lift a saddle. You knew which horse was nervous before it did.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You knew which horse was nervous before it did. That's a skill. You didn't know it then.

profession_backgrounds.name: Wild Rescuer
profession_backgrounds.description: You rescued and rehabilitated injured wildlife. Something broken that trusts you anyway — that's the thing that kept you going.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Something broken that trusts you anyway. That's the thing that keeps you going.

profession_backgrounds.name: Menagerie Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You cared for exotic animals in collections — cataloguing, feeding, understanding. Exotic animals are just regular animals that learned to eat people who weren't paying attention.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Exotic animals are just regular animals that learned to eat people who weren't paying attention.

profession_backgrounds.name: Feral Child
profession_backgrounds.description: You were raised with animals, and civilized language and society came later. Reading animals came before reading people. Both were learned; only one came naturally.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Language came later. Reading animals came before language. Reading people came after.

profession_backgrounds.name: Guerrilla Fighter
profession_backgrounds.description: You fought in asymmetric woodland warfare — no formations, no fair engagements. You did not fight fair. You fought correctly.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You did not fight fair. You fought correctly.

profession_backgrounds.name: Harassment Scout
profession_backgrounds.description: You disrupted enemy supply lines and patrols — invisible, irritating, and effective. Your job was to be annoying and not die. You were very good at both.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Your job was to be annoying and not die. You were very good at both.

profession_backgrounds.name: Border Patrol
profession_backgrounds.description: You enforced frontier zones through rapid movement and tracking — the border is not a line, it is a habit. Yours is vigilance.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The border is not a line. It's a habit. Yours is vigilance.

profession_backgrounds.name: Reformed Bandit
profession_backgrounds.description: You were a bandit who shifted allegiance — by choice, consequence, or the right encounter. Whether that makes you good or just tired is still being determined.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You stopped. Whether that makes you good or just tired is still being determined.

profession_backgrounds.name: War Messenger
profession_backgrounds.description: You carried urgent messages across dangerous terrain, alone, fast, and undetected. Speed is not the point. Arriving is the point. Speed helps.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Speed is not the point. Arriving is the point. Speed helps.

profession_backgrounds.name: Guild Blade
profession_backgrounds.description: You were the enforcement arm of an organized criminal guild — the one who made problems stop. The guild taught you everything. You were careful not to learn too much.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The guild taught you everything. You were careful not to learn too much.

profession_backgrounds.name: Back-Alley Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You grew up using violence for survival in the tight places between buildings and between choices. You fought dirty because clean fighting gets you killed in alleys.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You fought dirty because clean fighting gets you killed in alleys.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shadow Order Initiate
profession_backgrounds.description: You trained in a secret order of blade users — darkness as a tool, silence as a discipline. They taught you that darkness is not the absence of light.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They taught you that darkness is not the absence of light. It is a tool.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shadow Bodyguard
profession_backgrounds.description: You protected clients through concealment — they often didn't know you were there until they needed you to be. That was the point.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Your client never knew you were there until they needed you to be.

profession_backgrounds.name: Corrupt City Watch
profession_backgrounds.description: You served as city watch until you noticed who else was not enforcing the law — and adapted accordingly. The skills carried over. The allegiance did not.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You enforced the law until you noticed who else was not enforcing it. Then you adapted.

profession_backgrounds.name: Contract Killer
profession_backgrounds.description: You accepted payment for targeted eliminations. You never knew who wanted them dead. You learned not to ask.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You never knew who wanted them dead. You learned not to ask.

profession_backgrounds.name: Political Instrument
profession_backgrounds.description: You performed deniable operations for political factions — the kind that never appear in records. Everything you did served someone else's purpose. Until now.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Everything you did served someone else's purpose. Until now.

profession_backgrounds.name: Cult Executioner
profession_backgrounds.description: You served a cult's internal enforcement — eliminating the disloyal, the dangerous, and the inconvenient. The cult called it justice. You are still evaluating that.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The cult called it justice. You are still evaluating whether they were right.

profession_backgrounds.name: War Spy
profession_backgrounds.description: You performed assassinations during wartime under military commission. In wartime, everyone is an asset or a target. You learned which was which.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: In wartime, everyone is an asset or a target. You learned which was which.

profession_backgrounds.name: Grudge Killer
profession_backgrounds.description: You hunt specific targets for personal reasons. You started with one name. The list grew. You're not sure when the goal changed.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You started with one name. The list grew. You're not sure when the goal changed.

profession_backgrounds.name: Street Pickpocket
profession_backgrounds.description: You started small — hands and eyes in a crowd — and expanded from there. Technique grew. Risk tolerance grew. The fundamentals stayed the same.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Hands and eyes. That's all it is. Everything else is distraction.

profession_backgrounds.name: Vault Cracker
profession_backgrounds.description: You specialized in breaking into secured storage — mechanical locks, warded doors, guarded rooms. Every lock is a conversation. You learned to be persuasive.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Every lock is a conversation. You learned to be very persuasive.

profession_backgrounds.name: Art Thief
profession_backgrounds.description: You stole luxury and cultural items for buyers who didn't ask where they came from. Beautiful things belong to whoever is clever enough to hold them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Beautiful things belong to whoever is clever enough to hold them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Redistributor
profession_backgrounds.description: You stole from the wealthy and distributed to those who needed it, following a personal moral code that most people find either admirable or naïve. You haven't decided which.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't keep most of it. That is either your virtue or your biggest mistake.

profession_backgrounds.name: Cat Burglar
profession_backgrounds.description: You specialized in entering buildings undetected — rooftop approach, silent movement, clean exit. The building was never locked to you. Just unopened.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The building was never locked to you. Just unopened.

profession_backgrounds.name: War Saboteur
profession_backgrounds.description: You disrupted enemy supply lines and infrastructure under wartime commission. A bridge takes months to build. It takes minutes to stop an army.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: A bridge takes months to build. It takes minutes to stop an army.

profession_backgrounds.name: Guild Wrecker
profession_backgrounds.description: You were hired to destroy competitors' business operations — physical plant, supply chains, reputation. Competition is fine. You specialize in ending it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Competition is fine. You specialize in ending it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Burned Agent
profession_backgrounds.description: You were an intelligence operative until your handler burned you — exposed, cut off, left without cover. Your handler burned you. You didn't burn the skills.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Your handler burned you. You didn't burn the skills.

profession_backgrounds.name: Demolitions Handler
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked with dangerous materials in mines or war — calculating charges, placing precisely, managing the moment between placement and result.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The explosion is the easy part. Everything before the explosion is the work.

profession_backgrounds.name: Machine Wrecker
profession_backgrounds.description: You destroyed mechanical operations for clients or causes — mills, automated systems, industrial infrastructure. You learned what makes things work so you could make them stop.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You learned what makes things work so you could make them stop.

profession_backgrounds.name: Temple Defender
profession_backgrounds.description: You protected holy sites from desecration — standing vigil, confronting threats, ensuring that what was sacred remained so.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The sacred and the safe are not the same thing. You made them the same.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pilgrim Escort
profession_backgrounds.description: You guarded pilgrims on sacred journeys — their safety was your vocation, not your employment. They came to find something. Your job was to make sure they arrived.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They came to find something. Your job was to make sure they arrived to find it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Healer's Aide
profession_backgrounds.description: You assisted in faith-run healing ministry — dressing wounds, mixing remedies, sitting with the dying. Healing the body is also protecting it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Healing the body is also protecting it. You learned they were always the same task.

profession_backgrounds.name: Reformed Inquisitor
profession_backgrounds.description: You enforced a faith's definition of orthodoxy — investigating, interrogating, rendering judgment. The doubts came later. They are also real.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You enforced someone's version of truth. The doubts came later. The doubt is also true.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shrine Guardian
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained and defended a rural shrine — no army, no supply line, no relief. Just you, the community, and the sacred ground. That was enough.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: No army, no supply line, no relief. Just you and the shrine. That was enough.

profession_backgrounds.name: Hospital Ministrant
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked in a faith-run healing institution — treating the sick, comforting the dying, standing witness. You held their hand. That is also medicine.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You held their hand. That is also medicine.

profession_backgrounds.name: Plague Responder
profession_backgrounds.description: You entered quarantine zones to provide care when others refused. They asked you not to go in. You went in. Most of them survived.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They asked you not to go in. You went in. Most of them survived.

profession_backgrounds.name: Last Rites Officiant
profession_backgrounds.description: You administered final rites to the dying — present at more endings than most people witness in a lifetime. You learned what they all have in common.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You witnessed more endings than most people see. You learned what they all have in common.

profession_backgrounds.name: Orphanage Caretaker
profession_backgrounds.description: You ran or were raised in a faith-based orphanage — the work of keeping small lives going with limited resources. You didn't save everyone. You saved who you could.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't save everyone. You saved who you could. You remember all of them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Wandering Healer
profession_backgrounds.description: You traveled offering healing to remote communities — no fixed location, no institution. People asked where you were going. You said: wherever they need me.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: People asked where you were going. You said: wherever they need me.

profession_backgrounds.name: Dawn Temple Acolyte
profession_backgrounds.description: You served in formal ceremonies at dawn temples — the rituals, the timing, the discipline of light. The sun rises whether you perform the ceremony or not. The ceremony is for you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The sun rises whether you perform the ceremony or not. The ceremony is for you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Vigil Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained eternal flames and sacred vigils — long watches alone in the dark, keeping the light going until dawn. The flame does not go out. That is the vigil.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The flame does not go out. That is the vigil. That is also the lesson.

profession_backgrounds.name: Festival Priest
profession_backgrounds.description: You organized and led community religious festivals — the logistics, the ceremony, the bringing together. Community is a kind of light. You arranged the conditions for it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Community is a kind of light. You arranged the conditions for it to appear.

profession_backgrounds.name: Lightbringer Inquisitor
profession_backgrounds.description: You hunt beings of darkness on behalf of your faith — trackers and executioners in service to the light. Darkness is not metaphorical. You hunt what hides in it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Darkness is not metaphorical. You hunt what hides in it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Missionary
profession_backgrounds.description: You traveled to places that had never heard your faith and decided that was a problem worth solving. You learned to carry conviction into places that had no use for it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You traveled to places that had never heard your faith and decided that was a problem worth solving.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shield of the People
profession_backgrounds.description: You swore yourself to protect common folk — not as a soldier or hired guard, but as a vocation. They did not ask you. You decided.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They did not ask you to protect them. You decided to anyway.

profession_backgrounds.name: Holy Knight Initiate
profession_backgrounds.description: You trained in a holy warrior order — martial skill and religious vow intertwined. The order gave you a purpose. The purpose gave you the order. You are still untangling that.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The order gave you a purpose. The purpose gave you the order. You are still untangling that.

profession_backgrounds.name: Fortress Chaplain
profession_backgrounds.description: You provided spiritual care to soldiers in military fortifications — not a fighter, but the thing that made fighters. You were not a soldier. But you made soldiers.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You were not a soldier. But you made soldiers.

profession_backgrounds.name: Reliquary Guardian
profession_backgrounds.description: You protected holy artifacts during transit — the kind of assignment where the object matters more than the escort. You were comfortable with that.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: What you carried mattered more than your life. You were comfortable with that.

profession_backgrounds.name: Penitent Knight
profession_backgrounds.description: You did something that cannot be undone, and service is the only answer you have found. You carry what you did. The shield is part of the answer.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You did something that cannot be undone. Service is the only answer you have found.

profession_backgrounds.name: Grey Academy Graduate
profession_backgrounds.description: You completed formal training at a Greys magical institution — theory, application, supervised practice. The Academy taught you what is known. You became interested in what isn't.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The Academy taught you what is known. You became interested in what isn't.

profession_backgrounds.name: Library Archivist
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained magical reference collections — cataloguing, cross-referencing, knowing where everything was and what it connected to. You know where everything is. Including things not yet found.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You know where everything is. Including things that have not been found yet.

profession_backgrounds.name: Research Assistant
profession_backgrounds.description: You assisted established mages in their research — running experiments, recording results, advancing their work. You did the work. Your supervisor got the credit. You got the knowledge.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You did the work. Your supervisor got the credit. You got the knowledge.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pure Theorist
profession_backgrounds.description: You know magic deeply from years of theoretical study — models, frameworks, principles. In theory, you are one of the most capable mages alive. In practice, you are about to find out.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: In theory, you are one of the most capable mages alive. In practice, you are about to find out.

profession_backgrounds.name: Magic Tutor
profession_backgrounds.description: You taught basic magic to wealthy children and uninitiated adults. Explaining magic to someone who cannot do it yet taught you more about the fundamentals than the Academy did.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Explaining magic to someone who cannot do it yet taught you more than the Academy did.

profession_backgrounds.name: Weather Reader
profession_backgrounds.description: You studied natural phenomena to predict weather patterns — barometric pressure, cloud formations, elemental currents. The weather does not lie. It speaks a language most people haven't learned.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The weather does not lie. It only speaks a language most people haven't learned.

profession_backgrounds.name: Survey Mage
profession_backgrounds.description: You evaluated mineral deposits using elemental sensitivity — earth-reading as a professional skill, before you understood it as power.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The earth speaks in pressure and heat. You learned to listen.

profession_backgrounds.name: Fire Warden
profession_backgrounds.description: You managed controlled burns and fire safety — preventing, containing, directing flame. Fire is not your enemy. Uncontrolled fire is your enemy.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Fire is not your enemy. Uncontrolled fire is your enemy. You specialize in control.

profession_backgrounds.name: Storm Watcher
profession_backgrounds.description: You documented extreme weather from dangerous locations — climbing toward the storm while everyone else ran. It taught you everything about elemental force.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You climbed toward the storm while everyone else ran. It taught you everything.

profession_backgrounds.name: Alchemical Apprentice
profession_backgrounds.description: You studied elemental principles through alchemy — the substance behind the theory, the transformation underlying the magic.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The elements are not metaphors. They are substances with properties. You know them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Enchantment Worker
profession_backgrounds.description: You enchanted items for pay in a workshop — sustained focus, repeatable results, understanding the difference between permanent and temporary. You made things permanent that were supposed to be temporary.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You made things permanent that were supposed to be temporary. That's enchantment.

profession_backgrounds.name: Arcane Cartographer
profession_backgrounds.description: You mapped magical ley lines and anomalies — the invisible architecture of arcane power. Magic does not flow randomly. You mapped where it flows. The map is alarming.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Magic does not flow randomly. You mapped where it flows. The map is alarming.

profession_backgrounds.name: Forbidden Text Translator
profession_backgrounds.description: You decoded restricted magical documents — the ones locked away for reasons that were never fully explained. You translated them to find out what those reasons were.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They were forbidden for a reason. You translated them to find out what that reason was.

profession_backgrounds.name: Spell Salvager
profession_backgrounds.description: You recovered magic from abandoned sites — extracting what was left behind before it did something on its own.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Abandoned magic does not go away. You retrieve it before it does something on its own.

profession_backgrounds.name: Magic Evaluator
profession_backgrounds.description: You assessed and authenticated magical artifacts for clients and collections. Everyone says their item is powerful. You know what that means. Usually, it means it isn't.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Everyone says their item is powerful. You know what that means. Usually, it means it isn't.

profession_backgrounds.name: Stonecutter's Apprentice
profession_backgrounds.description: You carved runes into stone structures as an apprentice to a master stonecutter. Stone remembers what is cut into it. You learned to say things that should be remembered.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Stone remembers what is cut into it. You learned to say things that should be remembered.

profession_backgrounds.name: Rune Interpreter
profession_backgrounds.description: You read and deciphered ancient runic scripts — the kind that stop being readable long before they stop meaning things.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Old runes do not stop meaning things. They stop being readable. That is not the same.

profession_backgrounds.name: Ward Setter
profession_backgrounds.description: You installed protective runes on buildings, roads, and transit routes for clients. Wards placed wrong protect nothing. You placed them right.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Wards placed wrong protect nothing. You placed them right.

profession_backgrounds.name: Rune Forger
profession_backgrounds.description: You created — and forged — runic documents and authentication marks. A rune that says the wrong thing, inscribed correctly, is still effective. You leveraged that.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: A rune that says the wrong thing, inscribed correctly, is still effective. You leveraged that.

profession_backgrounds.name: Tomb Scribe
profession_backgrounds.description: You documented runes found in ancient burial sites — reading what the dead left behind before it triggered something.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The dead leave instructions. You learn to read them before you trigger them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Forge District Worker
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked in hot metal industries — forge, smeltery, foundry. The heat never bothered you. Everyone else in the forge noticed before you did.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The heat never bothered you. Everyone else in the forge noticed before you did.

profession_backgrounds.name: Sacred Flame Tender
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained sacred flames in a temple — until the flame responded to you differently than it did to others. The temple noticed. Then you left.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The flame responded to you differently than to others. The temple noticed. Then you left.

profession_backgrounds.name: Accidental Arsonist
profession_backgrounds.description: Fire manifested from you in a moment of crisis — you didn't mean to. That is also true of most fires. That's what makes them dangerous.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't mean to. That is also true of most fires. That's what makes them dangerous.

profession_backgrounds.name: Fire Performer
profession_backgrounds.description: You used emerging fire talent for entertainment on performance circuits — crowds thought it was a trick. You let them think that for a long time.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They thought it was a trick. You let them think that for a long time.

profession_backgrounds.name: Desert Wanderer
profession_backgrounds.description: You wandered desert territories where heat kills most things — and discovered it was simply home to you. The desert kills with heat. You made the heat your home.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The desert kills with heat. You learned to make the heat your home.

profession_backgrounds.name: Ship Lookout
profession_backgrounds.description: You served on ships as lookout — reading sky and sea before instruments could. You felt the storm in the air before the clouds showed it. The captain started believing you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You felt the storm in the air before the clouds showed it. The captain started believing you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Mountain Shepherd
profession_backgrounds.description: You tended flocks at high altitude — constant exposure to storms, lightning, and electrical atmosphere. You stopped hiding from the lightning. Then you started reaching toward it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The lightning came so often you stopped hiding. Then you started reaching toward it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Lightning Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You were struck by lightning and survived — changed. Something went through you that should have killed you. Instead it stayed.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Something went through you that should have killed you. Instead it stayed.

profession_backgrounds.name: Storm Chaser
profession_backgrounds.description: You followed storms obsessively — not to document them, but to be close to something that felt right. You were not chasing storms. You were chasing the feeling. You found it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You were not chasing storms. You were chasing the feeling. You found it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Coastal Fisherman
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked dangerous coastal waters — the sea is patient, it tests you until something in you tests back.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The sea is patient. It tests you until something in you tests back.

profession_backgrounds.name: Mine Worker
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked deep underground — tunnels, seams, rock face. You heard the rock before you learned to listen to it. They thought you were strange. You were right.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You heard the rock before you learned to listen to it. They thought you were strange. You were right.

profession_backgrounds.name: Stone Sculptor
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked stone obsessively — shaping, carving, responding to what the material wanted to be. The stone tells you what it wants to be. You learned to hear it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The stone tells you what it wants to be. You learned to hear it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Earthquake Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You survived a major seismic event — the ground moved under you, and something in you moved with it. It never moved back.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The ground moved under you. Something in you moved with it. It never moved back.

profession_backgrounds.name: Cave Explorer
profession_backgrounds.description: You spent years mapping and exploring underground cave systems — the earth bond formed in darkness, slowly, over thousands of hours.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Darkness underground is different from darkness above. You learned both.

profession_backgrounds.name: Quarry Foreman
profession_backgrounds.description: You managed stone extraction operations — workers brought strange stones to you. They said you always knew which ones mattered. You didn't know why then.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Workers brought strange stones to you. They said you always knew which ones mattered.

profession_backgrounds.name: River Pilot
profession_backgrounds.description: You navigated rivers professionally — reading current, depth, mood. The river has moods. You read them. Passengers paid you to be right.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The river has moods. You read them. Passengers paid you to be right.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pearl Diver
profession_backgrounds.description: You spent years underwater in diving work — the water bond formed over thousands of descents. Underwater, the world becomes different. You became different in it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Underwater, the world becomes different. You became different in it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Drought Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You found water when there was none — the water sense emerged from desperation and became something else.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You found water when there was none. You started to understand that you were finding yourself.

profession_backgrounds.name: Tide Watcher
profession_backgrounds.description: You documented tidal patterns over decades — the tide is not random. Nothing is random when you pay enough attention.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The tide is not random. Nothing is random when you pay enough attention.

profession_backgrounds.name: Flood Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: A major flood took everything around you. You stayed. Something in the water noticed.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The water took everything. You stayed. Something in the water noticed.

profession_backgrounds.name: Forest Herbalist
profession_backgrounds.description: You collected and prepared medicinal plants for your community — the fundamental knowledge of what lives in the earth and what it can do.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Every plant is doing something. You learned what.

profession_backgrounds.name: Root Healer
profession_backgrounds.description: You served your community as an informal healer using natural methods — no title, no institution, just generations of knowledge and a community that needed you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: No formal training. No title. Just generations of knowledge and a community that needed you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Grove Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained sacred groves for druidic circles — tending, protecting, sustaining the living covenant. The grove is not a place. It is a relationship.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The grove is not a place. It is a relationship. You maintained it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Wild Carer
profession_backgrounds.description: You healed injured animals in the wild — creatures that had no reason to trust you and chose to anyway.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Something broken that trusts you anyway. That's the thing that keeps you going.

profession_backgrounds.name: Plague Responder (Druid)
profession_backgrounds.description: You responded to disease outbreaks using natural knowledge — entering where the sickness was worst. Life fights back. You are how life fights back.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Life fights back. You are how life fights back.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pack Observer
profession_backgrounds.description: You spent years observing and slowly habituating with wolf packs — until they stopped seeing you as prey. That took three winters.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The pack accepted you when they stopped seeing you as prey. That took three winters.

profession_backgrounds.name: Raptor Trainer
profession_backgrounds.description: You trained birds of prey for hunting — the discipline of falconry, the patience of bond-building. A raptor does not belong to you. It chooses you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: A raptor does not belong to you. It chooses you. That distinction is everything.

profession_backgrounds.name: Livestock Whisperer
profession_backgrounds.description: You managed difficult or sick animals for farmers — the ones that wouldn't let anyone else near them. Farmers stopped asking how you did it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Sick animals who won't let you near them. You found a way. Farmers stopped asking how.

profession_backgrounds.name: Animal Guide
profession_backgrounds.description: You navigated terrain by reading animal behavior and patterns — birds know where they are. You learned to ask them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Birds know where they are. You learned to ask them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Menagerie Escapee
profession_backgrounds.description: You cared for exotic animals in a collection — until you couldn't leave them there anymore. You cared for them. Eventually you couldn't leave them there.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You cared for them. Eventually you couldn't leave them there.

profession_backgrounds.name: Unofficial Forest Ranger
profession_backgrounds.description: You self-appointed as guardian of a specific forest — no authority named you, no authority needed to. The forest didn't need authority. It needed someone paying attention.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: No authority appointed you. The forest didn't need authority. It needed someone paying attention.

profession_backgrounds.name: Ancient Tree Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained and communicated with old-growth trees — learning their pace, their long memory, their slow speech. Old trees speak slowly. You learned to listen at their pace.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Old trees speak slowly. You learned to listen at their pace.

profession_backgrounds.name: Invasive Species Fighter
profession_backgrounds.description: You removed harmful plants and animals threatening natural ecosystems. The forest has immune systems. You are one of them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The forest has immune systems. You are one of them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Forest Restorer
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked to regrow devastated woodland after fires or clearance — the fire took it in a day. Returning it takes a life. You chose the life.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The fire took it in a day. Returning it takes a life. You chose the life.

profession_backgrounds.name: Seed Vault Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained seed stocks for rare plant preservation — working against extinction one careful entry at a time.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Against extinction, you maintain options. That is all you can do. You do it precisely.

profession_backgrounds.name: Pact-Bound
profession_backgrounds.description: You made a deal with something from the void — you wanted something badly enough. You didn't read the full terms.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You wanted something badly enough. You didn't read the full terms.

profession_backgrounds.name: Near-Death Seeker
profession_backgrounds.description: You sought void contact through deliberately near-death experiences. You saw what was past the edge. Now you can't unsee it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You sought the edge to see what was past it. You saw. Now you can't unsee it.

profession_backgrounds.name: Void Cult Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You were part of a void cult and escaped. Some of what they taught you was true. That's the dangerous part.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They told you the void was truth. Some of what they said was true. That's the dangerous part.

profession_backgrounds.name: Void-Scarred
profession_backgrounds.description: A void event marked you without your seeking it. You didn't seek it. It found you. That makes the relationship complicated.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't seek it. It found you. That makes the relationship complicated.

profession_backgrounds.name: Void Scholar
profession_backgrounds.description: You studied the void obsessively until it studied you back. Your research became very interesting at that point.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You studied the void until the void studied you back. Your research became very interesting.

profession_backgrounds.name: Blood Ritual Initiate
profession_backgrounds.description: You underwent blood rites as part of a hidden order — willing, knowing what it meant. The ritual changed you. You agreed anyway.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The ritual changed you. You knew it would. You agreed anyway.

profession_backgrounds.name: Battlefield Surgeon
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked as a battlefield surgeon until blood became something other than a medical problem. You understood blood as medicine. Then you understood it as something else.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You understood blood as medicine. Then you understood it as something else. You didn't go back.

profession_backgrounds.name: Blood Lineage Bearer
profession_backgrounds.description: Blood power passed through your family line and surfaced in you. You were the one it surfaced in. You are still figuring out why.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: It was in your family. You were the one it surfaced in. You are still figuring out why.

profession_backgrounds.name: Sacrifice Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You were put on the altar. The altar disagreed. So did you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They put you on the altar. The altar disagreed. So did you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Oath-Breaker
profession_backgrounds.description: You broke a blood oath knowing what it meant. The power that came from breaking it doesn't make it right.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You broke it knowing what it meant. The power that came from breaking it doesn't make it right.

profession_backgrounds.name: Nightmare Oracle
profession_backgrounds.description: You experienced prophetic nightmares that others sought out for divination. They came to you because your nightmares were accurate. You charged them for that.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They came to you because your nightmares were accurate. You charged them for that.

profession_backgrounds.name: Fear Harvester
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked for someone who collected fear as a resource — you were their collection mechanism. Fear is a resource. Someone was collecting it.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Fear is a resource. Someone was collecting it. You were their collection mechanism.

profession_backgrounds.name: Dungeon Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You spent months in a nightmare location — the dark changed what the dark means to you. It stopped being empty.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Months in the dark changes what the dark means to you. It stopped being empty.

profession_backgrounds.name: Phobia Manifester
profession_backgrounds.description: Your deepest fear externalized into power. Your deepest fear learned to live outside you. Then it learned to serve you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Your deepest fear learned to live outside you. Then it learned to serve you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Turned Terror
profession_backgrounds.description: Dread magic was used against you. You kept it when the attacker didn't survive.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They used terror against you. You kept it when the attacker didn't survive.

profession_backgrounds.name: Cult's Right Hand
profession_backgrounds.description: You ran a cult's operations without being the leader — the real power behind the visible figure. You didn't lead the cult. You made the leader possible. That was more power.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You didn't lead the cult. You made the leader possible. That was more power.

profession_backgrounds.name: Confidence Trickster
profession_backgrounds.description: You used false authority to manipulate people — until the manipulation stopped being a trick and became something real.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You discovered your power was real when the manipulation stopped being a trick.

profession_backgrounds.name: Puppet Master
profession_backgrounds.description: You manipulated political figures from the shadows — your candidates ran for you. You never ran for anything.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You never ran for anything. Your candidates ran for you.

profession_backgrounds.name: False Authority
profession_backgrounds.description: You used fabricated authority so convincingly that real power surfaced in the process. The authority was false. The power it revealed was not.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The authority was false. The power it revealed was not.

profession_backgrounds.name: Mind-Breaker's Apprentice
profession_backgrounds.description: You studied under someone who broke minds professionally, then applied the lessons to them. Your instructor taught you everything. Then you applied the lessons to them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Your instructor taught you everything. Then you applied the lessons to them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Village Hexer
profession_backgrounds.description: You placed curses for your community — justice, revenge, protection. The village came to you with their grievances. You gave them resolution.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The village came to you with their grievances. You gave them resolution.

profession_backgrounds.name: Grudge Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You collected grievances and cursed those named by the wronged. People share their pain and then forget about it. You didn't forget.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: People share their pain and then forget about it. You didn't forget.

profession_backgrounds.name: Trial Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You survived witch trial accusations by escaping before the verdict. They burned everything you owned. They didn't burn you. Now you're outside their reach.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: They burned everything you owned. They didn't burn you. Now you're outside their reach.

profession_backgrounds.name: Ill-Named Crone's Apprentice
profession_backgrounds.description: You apprenticed to a feared local witch for ten years. She died leaving you the harder half of what she knew.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: She taught you for ten years and then died. You got the hard half of the knowledge.

profession_backgrounds.name: Cursed Object Collector
profession_backgrounds.description: You gathered and studied cursed artifacts — cataloguing what they wanted, containing what they would do otherwise.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Cursed objects are just objects with intentions. You catalogued what they wanted.

profession_backgrounds.name: Plague Quarter Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: You survived a devastating plague when most around you did not. The disease took everything around you. You absorbed something from that proximity.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: The disease took everything around you. You absorbed something from that proximity.

profession_backgrounds.name: Corpse Handler
profession_backgrounds.description: You prepared bodies during outbreaks — exposure that was supposed to be professional. You prepared the dead. You were not supposed to carry something back from them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You prepared the dead. You were not supposed to carry something back from them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Spoilage Witch
profession_backgrounds.description: Things rot near you. It became a reputation before you understood it was a power. You stopped apologizing for it when you realized it was useful.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Things rot near you. You stopped apologizing for it when you realized it was useful.

profession_backgrounds.name: Swamp Crone's Apprentice
profession_backgrounds.description: You spent three years learning decay magic from a crone in the swamp. Decay is just transformation without a schedule.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Three years in the swamp. The crone taught you that decay is just transformation without a schedule.

profession_backgrounds.name: Poison Garden Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You grew toxic plants and developed deep blight attunement from sustained exposure. Everything in your garden could kill something. You knew what it was for.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Everything in your garden could kill something. You grew it anyway. You knew what it was for.

profession_backgrounds.name: Midwife
profession_backgrounds.description: You attended births and deaths until blood began speaking to you at both. You attended enough thresholds that the blood began to speak.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You attended enough thresholds that the blood began to speak to you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Blood Debt Holder
profession_backgrounds.description: You collected blood debts from those who owed you — and learned to be the one holding them rather than the one owing them.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Blood debts compound. You learned to be the one holding them, not the one owing them.

profession_backgrounds.name: Circle Keeper
profession_backgrounds.description: You maintained monthly blood rites for a hidden circle — consistency as a kind of magic. Every month, without fail. The power grew.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Every month. Without fail. The circle met and the power grew. Consistency is its own kind of magic.

profession_backgrounds.name: Battlefield Gleaner
profession_backgrounds.description: You gathered blood components from battlefields after engagements — very specific about what you came for.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: After battles, you came for things the armies left behind. You were very specific about what.

profession_backgrounds.name: Circle's Sole Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: Twelve went in. One came out. The ritual worked. Just not the way they planned.
equipment_bonus: Power That Should Have Been Shared
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Twelve went in. One came out. The ritual worked. Just not the way they planned.

profession_backgrounds.name: Gravedigger
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked cemeteries for years — digging, filling, maintaining. You heard them before you understood what you were hearing.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You heard them before you understood what you were hearing. That takes time.

profession_backgrounds.name: Mourning House Worker
profession_backgrounds.description: You prepared bodies for burial in a death house — the rituals of ending. The next part began to acknowledge you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You prepared them for the next part. The next part began to acknowledge you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Ancestor Seeker
profession_backgrounds.description: You sought to speak to dead family through ritual — and something answered.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You wanted to speak to the ones you lost. Something answered.

profession_backgrounds.name: Tomb Robber
profession_backgrounds.description: You entered burial sites to take from them. The dead started taking an interest back.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You entered the places of the dead to take from them. They started taking an interest back.

profession_backgrounds.name: Death Cult Neophyte
profession_backgrounds.description: You joined a death-worship cult — for the community, for the answers, for the power. You stayed for the power. That's what most of them say.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You joined for the community. You stayed for the power. That's what most of them say.

profession_backgrounds.name: Hospice Worker
profession_backgrounds.description: You watched many people die in hospice care. Then you started to see them go. Watching and seeing are not the same thing.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You watched many people go. You started to see them go. That is not the same thing.

profession_backgrounds.name: Soul Bargainer
profession_backgrounds.description: You made informal arrangements involving soul pledges — effective, ethically complex, difficult to walk back.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You made arrangements involving things that should not be traded. You were very effective.

profession_backgrounds.name: Near-Death Returned
profession_backgrounds.description: You died briefly and came back changed — something there recognized you and let you return.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You were somewhere else briefly. Something there recognized you and let you come back.

profession_backgrounds.name: Shade Companion
profession_backgrounds.description: You befriended a ghost as a child and grew into the talent naturally. People thought you were strange. You were just perceptive.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You've had a ghost friend since you were a child. People thought you were strange. You were just perceptive.

profession_backgrounds.name: Execution Witness
profession_backgrounds.description: You attended as many executions as you could. You told people you were documenting. That was partly true.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You attended every one you could. You told people you were documenting. That was partly true.

profession_backgrounds.name: Failed Plague Doctor
profession_backgrounds.description: You tried to stop a plague and couldn't. The rot showed you something in failing that medicine hadn't.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You tried to stop it. You couldn't. The rot showed you something in failing.

profession_backgrounds.name: Battlefield Scavenger
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked battlefields after armies moved on — what you took from that ground came with you.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You came after the armies. What you took from that ground came with you.

profession_backgrounds.name: Anatomy Sculptor
profession_backgrounds.description: You worked with preserved bodies for anatomy study and sculptural reference — understanding the body's architecture until you understood what could be changed.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: You studied the body's architecture until you understood what could be changed.

profession_backgrounds.name: Decay Farmer
profession_backgrounds.description: You cultivated rot for alchemical use — rot as a process, not a condition. You learned to manage the process.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Rot is a process, not a condition. You learned to manage the process.

profession_backgrounds.name: Siege Survivor
profession_backgrounds.description: Everyone else died in the siege. You changed instead. You have not fully resolved how you feel about that.
profession_backgrounds.flavor_trait: Everyone else died. You changed instead. You have not fully resolved how you feel about that.
